creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, 

I forgot to commit the patch needed to build haproxy on i386.
Thanks for reporting, I re-added it back, please update your ports tree.

As for LibreSSL support, it is not FreeBSD-specific problem, so it should be addressed upstream.  Currently haproxy does not support LibreSSL.

Please bug developers <haproxy@formilux.org> for adding LibreSSL support to haproxy.

Thanks!
